name: NetApp, Inc.
description: NetApp, Inc. is a global cloud-led, data-centric software company that provides a range of data services, including storage, management, and protection. The company enables organizations to manage their data across hybrid multi-cloud environments, offering solutions for cloud storage, data protection, and infrastructure management. NetApp's portfolio includes the ONTAP data management software, which helps businesses optimize their data storage and accessibility. By integrating with major public cloud providers, NetApp helps customers accelerate their digital transformation and leverage data for competitive advantage in the digital economy.
